__metadata.s6_quartile_note: s6_quartile values in this file are character-based boundaries from the Day 2 primary analysis pass. They have been superseded by token-based quartile boundaries computed post-hoc. Authoritative source: day_2/quartile_analysis/quartile_breakdown_full.csv (token_min/token_max columns). Summary interpretation: day_2/quartile_analysis/bimodal_summary.md. Do not use s6_quartile from this file for any quantitative quartile-boundary lookup.

flash_L18_L2_L1.s6_quartile_note: DEPRECATED: adjacent s6_quartile uses CHARACTER-based boundaries (Day 2 primary pass). Superseded by token-based boundaries in day_2/quartile_analysis/quartile_breakdown_full.csv (token_min/token_max). Do not consume s6_quartile quantitatively. See file-level __metadata.
